title: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio showcasing skills, projects, and experience.
moredes: A responsive portfolio website built with React and custom CSS to present my work and experience.

title: Mindful Insights
description: Full-stack wellness platform with dashboards, collaboration, and analytics.
moredes: Mindful Insights is a full-stack platform that helps teams track engagement, collaborate, and publish research with a clean, organized dashboard experience.

title: Readme Exporter
description: Export README content into branded, printable formats.
moredes: A web tool that converts README exports into styled HTML, PDF, or DOCX with branding and translation options.

title: Shelter Management System
description: Shelter management system for pet adoption and surrender.
moredes: A web app that lets adopters browse pets and owners list pets for surrender with detailed profiles.

title: LifeLink
description: Platform connecting blood and organ donors with recipients.
moredes: A platform that matches donors and recipients by blood type and organ compatibility, streamlining donation availability.

title: Checkmate
description: Back-end focused project with no UI.
moredes: A role-based task management application built with NestJS, PostgreSQL, and Docker, enabling teams to assign, track, and manage tasks efficiently

title: Smart Contract
description: Smart contract implementation and related services.
moredes: This project is a backend API built with NestJS that helps organizations manage contracts from creation to expiration in a structured and controlled way.

title: Mindful Insights UI
description: Figma UI for the Mindful Insights project.
moredes: Figma UI for the Mindful Insights project, focusing on dashboards, cards, and productivity flows.

title: Mindful Insights Login UI
moredes: Login screen UI concept designed in Figma for Mindful Insights.

title: Prototype UI
moredes: A UI prototype focused on layout, interaction, and component refinement.
